design_direction: Field dispatch — Source Serif 4 / Inter, Pattern D timeline (LDVP) + Pattern B two-column long-form (programs), warm off-white #fafaf7, ink black, rust-orange accent #b54a1d

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: We paid experienced FLWs to fake 100 visit records each across three rounds and offered bonuses to the top 25% most convincing fabricators. Out of 33 adversarial fakers, 97.5% of real workers scored cleaner than even the lowest-scoring fabricator — using just three data points (age, gender, MUAC). AUC 0.91 ± 0.09.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /verify (4 phases) + full Pattern B dispatch on /chc (385 words) + entry on /insights

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Without microplans, FLWs in CHC averaged 0.4 visits per estimated eligible child — they cherry-picked accessible households. With microplans forcing them to close every Delivery Unit before unlocking the next Service Area, they hit 1.4 visits per child. A 3.5× thoroughness gain, and population coverage rose from 82–84% to 94%.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /verify (4 phases including the failure mode) + full Pattern B dispatch on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: In the CHC program, cost per verified visit fell 22% — from $2.20 to $1.70 — as the program scaled.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Pattern D timeline on /pay (3 phases including bundle separation) + Pattern B dispatch on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Conventional procurement says vet partners thoroughly before contracting. We tried it. Past reputation, team size, organizational maturity — none of it reliably predicted whether an LLO would actually deliver. So we invented the Trial Run.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /deliver (4 phases) + Pattern B dispatch on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Workers who aced our digital knowledge test still struggled with the nuances of in-person counseling. So we layered the model: self-paced learning, in-app test, daily AI coach interaction (Open Chat Studio), peer practice, one supervised observation visit. 85% progress to delivery; 88% above 70% on first observed visits.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /learn (4 phases) + cross-referenced on /ecd

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Our Malawi ECD pilot (76 FLWs, 9,510+ visits, 50-caregiver baseline/endline) found nearly all caregivers already held positive ECD attitudes at baseline. Knowledge of rapid-development timing rose +33%; observed teaching behavior +21%; encouragement of autonomy +21% but still only 47% at endline. So we doubled the dosage from 3 visits to 8–10 across 12 months.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern B dispatch on /ecd (3 dispatches; floor effect, dosage, FLW competence) + Pattern D learning on /learn

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Of 7 LLOs in our CLP Stage 2 vaccine campaign, 5–6 independently leveraged religious leaders, community leaders, or existing community relationships to navigate vaccine hesitancy. They did this before we asked.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /deliver (3 phases) + Pattern B dispatch 5 on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: In the Central African Republic, both contracted LLOs in our CHC vaccine work dropped out — staffing and connectivity issues. Remote coordination wasn't enough. We've now flagged fragile contexts as requiring dedicated in-country presence before activation.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /deliver (2 phases, 359 words) — published failure

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: 107 EOI applications. 37 contracted under Trial Run terms. 24 advanced to full Trials. 14 passed and ran larger campaigns. The 35% that didn't pass aren't continued.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Phase 4 of /deliver Trial Run timeline + Pattern B dispatch 1 on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: KMC has 4 mandatory home visits per SVN as a payment criterion. Its 'first visit within 3 days of discharge' is a guardrail — audited, not enforced. Current performance: 50% against a 70% target. Platforms that punish guardrails don't get honest data.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D phase 3 on /verify + Pattern B dispatch 3 on /kmc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Kangaroo Mother Care reduces neonatal mortality by up to 40%. The WHO recommends it for all newborns ≤2000g. Yet global KMC coverage remains below 5% for eligible infants — hospitals discharge families within days; structured at-home follow-up rarely exists.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern B dispatch 1 on /kmc (305 words)

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: 880,000+ verified CHC visits in 14 months across 8 countries — performance-payment delivery at a pace that conventional NGO-led VAS supplementation typically achieves over multi-year campaigns in the same geographies. 44 LLOs activated.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Hero stat ledger + dispatch meta on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Our $1.70 weighted average per verified visit hides the bundle. Nigeria CHC with ORS/Zinc co-packs averaged $1.30 across 14 LLO contracts. Outside Nigeria — VAS + deworming, no ORS — averaged $0.78 across 17 contracts.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D phase 3 on /pay + Pattern B dispatch 4 on /chc

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: In our Kenya CHC pilot, an AI chatbot on Dimagi's Open Chat Studio (accessed via WhatsApp) handled 500 of 511 FLW queries — 97.8% — without human escalation, with a 5-second average response time. Independent evaluation: 88.7% accuracy, 81.5% usefulness.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /learn (3 phases, learning 3)

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Funders routinely ask whether paid campaign work crowds out volunteer health work. We commissioned 24 in-depth interviews in Gombe and Sokoto. Campaigns are not a disruption of Nigeria's CHV system — they ARE the system. CHVs routinely run campaigns, and other volunteers cover routine work during them.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /pay (4 phases, learning 3, 257 words)

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: 65% of LLOs that enter our Trial Run pass it. We publish that number because the alternative — opaque vendor lists — is what funders are trying to escape.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Embedded in /deliver Trial Run timeline + /insights platform-mechanisms group

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Most platforms report cost-per-FLW-trained, cost-per-app-installed, or cost-per-enrolled-LLO. We report cost-per-verified-visit because the others hide the lever that matters — whether the work was done. The asymmetry between activity-cost and outcome-cost is where most development funding gets eaten.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D timeline on /pay (3 phases, learning 2)

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Every Connect KMC home visit, the FLW arrives with a weighing scale, thermometer, pulse oximeter, and measuring tape. The app captures the readings. Danger signs auto-trigger referrals.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern B dispatch 2 on /kmc (310 words including equipment uptime caveat)

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: Across 4,005 KMC cases (March 2026), we hit our 28-day enrollment target — average age at enrollment 12.8 days. We are missing our 70%-within-3-days-of-discharge target — currently 50%.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern B dispatch 4 on /kmc (297 words)

nuggets_used.verbatim_landed: A fabricated visit on Connect has to beat four independent verification layers: biometric (FLW identity), GPS (location), photo (visit context), and algorithmic (statistical pattern from age/gender/MUAC). The other three layers compound.
nuggets_used.depth_treatment: Full Pattern D phase 4 on /verify + Pattern B dispatch 3 on /chc

top_3_landed_verbatim.N1: 97.5% of real workers scored cleaner than even the lowest-scoring fabricator (full adversarial paid-bonus protocol described across /verify Phase 2-3 and /chc dispatch 3)
top_3_landed_verbatim.N6: Caregivers' attitudes were already correct (full Pattern B dispatch on /ecd with the floor-effect named explicitly and the dosage redesign tied to it)
top_3_landed_verbatim.N15: Campaign work in Nigeria isn't a disruption of routine care — it IS the routine care (full Pattern D timeline on /pay with the Western-assumption framing)
